name: Italian-Style Broccoli
recipeIngredient: 1 Clove garlic, minced or put through press
1 small Dried hot red pepper, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam broccoli for 10 minutes, or until tender and still bright green.
2. Refresh under cold water.
3. Heat olive oil over medium heat and saute garlic and red pepper for 2 minutes.
4. Add broccoli and wine and saute, stirring, another 3 to 5 minutes.
Serves 4 to 6.
